name: MirrorMind
shortDesc: A journaling AI that reflects your thinking back — structured Socratic questioning, not answers.
longDesc: Most AI tools give you answers. MirrorMind does the opposite — it reads what you wrote and responds with a question designed to push your own thinking one layer deeper. Built on the idea that clarity comes from within, not from a chatbot. The system uses a question-tree structure where each response is chosen based on the emotional and logical pattern of your entry. The goal is to be the tool Al-Ghazali would have used for muhasaba — self-accounting.

name: LostAndFound
shortDesc: A system which helps you discover the lost items in your by specifying your area.
longDesc: A system which takes your location and uses that to show you the lost items around you. When registering a lost item you can add the tag of location and th sytem will automatically link that item to that location, and the people in that location can see it. Other than that it will automatically pair found items with already regsitered lost ones or add new entries if no such item has been registered as lost yet.

name: SkillHub
shortDesc: A platform that can teach yoh practical real world skills practically
longDesc: This platform which teaches a vast variety of skills using pracice and hands on training. It will go beyond conventional skills and teach people how to communicate, learn, think, code, solve a problem, and technical skills like how to fix a light bulb, car engine, pc etc through interactive 3d models, quizes, and explainers

name: DoomScroller
shortDesc: An agent that can 'scroll' your accounts for you and give you all the details that you might have missed
longDesc: This agent would go to your social accounts, and 'doomscrolls' for you, because scrolling does destroy your brain, attention span, cognitive skills and in general degrades your mental awareness, though one benefit it does give is keeps you updated on the latest news and fact which you just cannot get by searching things up; so this AI will got through your feed and group the facts, news, explanations by topic and you can ask it one by one to learn without breaking your attention span
